name: Amed Rosario
transactions: July 2, 2012:Signed by theNew York Metsas an amateur free agent.
January 7, 2021:Traded by theNew York MetswithIsaiah Greene(minors),Josh Wolf(minors) andAndrés Giménezto theCleveland IndiansforCarlos CarrascoandFrancisco Lindor.
July 26, 2023:Traded by theCleveland Guardiansto theLos Angeles DodgersforNoah Syndergaardand cash.
February 21, 2024:Signed as a Free Agent with theTampa Bay Rays.
July 29, 2024:Traded by theTampa Bay Raysto theLos Angeles DodgersforMichael Flynn(minors).
August 18, 2024:Selected off waivers by theCincinnati Redsfrom theLos Angeles Dodgers.
January 8, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theWashington Nationals.
July 26, 2025:Traded by theWashington Nationalsto theNew York YankeesforBrowm Martinez(minors) andClayton Beeter.
December 30, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
